apex.label: Apex
apex.description: Agent-generated trigger: enrich each Opportunity on update

findings.message: SOQL inside a loop — hits the 100-query governor at record 101. Passes unit tests with <100 rows.
findings.fix: Hoist the query above the loop: collect the record IDs into a Set<Id> before the loop, run one query with WHERE <lookup field> IN :ids, build a Map keyed by Id, then read from the map inside the loop.

findings.message: Hardcoded ID '0051g00000XyZaBAAV' — valid only in the org it was copied from; breaks every sandbox and new prod.
findings.fix: Resolve the record via Custom Metadata or a Custom Setting keyed by a stable DeveloperName, and look it up at runtime; never hardcode a record ID literal.

findings.message: opp.Account.Industry dereferences Account with no null guard — NPE when AccountId is null.
findings.fix: Guard: if (opp.AccountId != null) { … }, or query the parent and map it; relationship fields are not auto-loaded in triggers.

findings.message: Catch block is empty (or comment-only) — the exception is swallowed with no rethrow, no logging, no signal.
findings.fix: Re-throw, or addError() on the record, or publish a Platform Event / log record. A bare // TODO ships the bug.

findings.message: Update_Lead_Owner (recordUpdates) has no faultConnector. A validation rule or lock contention throws an unhandled fault and the flow dies silently.
findings.fix: Add a Fault connector to a Screen (interactive flows) or an error-logging subflow (autolaunched flows). Never leave DML faultless.

findings.message: Hardcoded ID '00G1g000004ZxYZEA0' in the assignment — breaks on deploy to any other org.
findings.fix: Resolve the record with a Get Records node filtered on a stable field (DeveloperName, Name), or store the ID in Custom Metadata — never paste an org-specific ID into a flow.

findings.message: settings.errorWorkflow is empty. Any node throwing fails the run silently — no alert, no retry, no dead-letter store.
findings.fix: Set settings.errorWorkflow to a workflow ID that posts to Slack or writes to a dead-letter store. Every prod workflow needs an error workflow.

findings.message: HTTP POST with retryOnFail: false — one transient 5xx permanently drops the record.
findings.fix: Set retryOnFail: true, maxTries: 3, waitBetweenTries: 1000. Transient failures should not be permanent.

findings.message: Webhook node has no authentication — any caller can trigger this workflow.
findings.fix: Set authentication to 'headerAuth' or 'basicAuth'. Unauthenticated webhooks are an open endpoint in prod.

findings.message: Destructive node (httpRequest) has no continueOnFail — one failure halts the entire downstream chain.
findings.fix: Set continueOnFail: true and add an IF node to check $node[...].error before continuing.

findings.message: Destructive node (emailSend) has no continueOnFail — one failure halts the entire downstream chain.
findings.fix: Set continueOnFail: true and add an IF node to check $node[...].error before continuing.
